page_text: Official Aalto University page for the 2026/27 Global Technology Grant. Non-EU/EEA Master's applicants in technology fields may apply. The page mentions competitive awards but does not state the percentage or value of funding.

rules.evidence_text: Official Aalto page states 2026/27 Global Technology Grant.
Official Aalto page says non-EU/EEA applicants may apply.
Official Aalto page addresses international applicants.

rules.requirement_text: Applicant is liable for tuition fees.
rules.evidence_text: Official Aalto page says the grant is for tuition-fee-liable students.
Official Aalto page states Master's applicants may apply.

rules.requirement_text: Technology and AI fields are included.
rules.evidence_text: Official Aalto page includes technology fields and AI-related programmes.

rules.requirement_text: Award must meet at least 40 percent funding need.

rules.evidence_text: Official Aalto page says applications follow the 2026/27 admissions round.
Official Aalto page says applicants request grant consideration in the admissions form.
